LoginForm.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Please check your email and password.
LoginForm.googleAuthError: Error authenticating with Google. Please try again later.
LoginForm.subtitle: Log in to manage your servers

RegisterForm.createAccountError: Could not create account. Please try with another email or username.
RegisterForm.googleAuthError: Error authenticating with Google. Please try again later.
RegisterForm.title: Create account
RegisterForm.subtitle: Join to start creating your servers

ServersPage.agentUnlinkedMessage: The sync engine has been unlinked through the local interface.
ServersPage.title: My Servers
ServersPage.subtitle: Manage your Minecraft network
ServersPage.noServersSubtitle: You haven't created any servers yet. Start your adventure now!

CreateServerWizard.title: Create Your Server
CreateServerWizard.ramHelpText: Memory will be natively allocated to the Java engine (-Xmx and -Xms).
CreateServerWizard.summaryDescription: The server will be installed natively using our Zero-Copy architecture for maximum speed.

AgentLinkingStage.title: Prepare Your Machine
AgentLinkingStage.subtitle: To create Minecraft servers, we first need to securely connect your computer to the CraftControl network.
AgentLinkingStage.step1Desc: Open the terminal on the PC hosting the servers and execute the following command to install our silent native daemon:
AgentLinkingStage.step2Desc: When executing the command, the terminal will display a 6-digit code to verify your identity. Type it here to link the machine to your account:

ServerOverview.configUpdatedToast: Configuration updated. If the server was running, changes will take effect on the next start.
ServerOverview.ipNotice: Note: If you stop or restart the server, the current public IP address will change.

ServerPlayers.commandExecuteError: Error executing command. Make sure the server is ONLINE.
ServerPlayers.title: Players
ServerPlayers.subtitle: Manage connections and server progress
ServerPlayers.whitelistedUsersDesc: Authorized players allowed to join the server.
ServerPlayers.emptyWhitelistDesc: No one is on the whitelist. Add a player using the field above.
ServerPlayers.emptyPlayersDesc: Players will appear here when they join the server and the world is saved.

ServerOptions.saveSuccessToast: Options saved successfully. Restart the server to apply changes.
ServerOptions.title: Server Options
ServerOptions.subtitle: Configure your world rules and settings
ServerOptions.onlineModeDesc: If disabled, non-premium (cracked) players will be able to join.
ServerOptions.whitelistDesc: Only players on the whitelist will be able to join the server.
ServerOptions.compatibilityModeDesc: Disables 'Zero-Copy' and clones the JAR locally. Useful if you have issues launching mods.
ServerOptions.allowFlightDesc: Prevents server from kicking flying players (useful for mods).
ServerOptions.hardcoreDesc: Permanent death (ban or spectator mode on death).
ServerOptions.enableCommandBlockDesc: Allows using and executing command blocks in the world.
ServerOptions.deleteServerDesc: This action will delete the server from your panel. You can choose whether to keep or delete files from disk.
ServerOptions.deleteWarningText: You are about to delete the server from your control panel.
ServerOptions.deleteGlobalNoteText: Global files (such as Java versions and libraries in the Vault) are always kept automatically to save bandwidth in the future.
ServerOptions.keepFilesDesc: We will not delete the server folder (worlds, plugins). Useful if you want to recreate it later.

ModList.invalidFileExtension: Please upload valid files with .jar or .zip extension
ModList.pendingChangesRestart: Pending changes. Restart the server for mods to take effect properly.
ModList.noInstalledDesc: Go to the Store to download or upload your own .jar files
ModList.modpacksDescIntro: Upload a .zip file of a modpack (for example, exported from CurseForge or Modrinth). It will be unzipped directly into the root of your server.
ModList.modpacksDescCautionText: This will overwrite critical folders like /mods and /config. If you already have mods installed, we recommend deleting them or creating a backup first.

Landing.versionLive: V2.0 is now live with Zero-Copy Linux Architecture
Landing.subtitle: Deploy, monitor, and configure your Paper, Fabric or Vanilla servers in seconds. All wrapped in a gorgeous blocky interface.
Landing.feature1Desc: Save gigabytes of storage by sharing a single JAR across all your network servers instantly.
Landing.feature2Desc: Interact with your server console in real-time and edit configuration files directly from your browser.
Landing.feature3Desc: Integrated Google OAuth, JWT sessions, and strict path traversal prevention out of the box.
